site.name: Overwatch Voice Line Viewer
site.tagline: An easy-to-browse collection of Overwatch conversations

infoBox.title: About This Site
infoBox.mainDescription: This site provides an easy way to browse and search through Overwatch's Voice Lines and in game conversations.
infoBox.footer: Browse by character below or use the navigation menu to explore all conversations and voice lines.

footer.copyright: Overwatch, the Overwatch logo, Blizzard, and the Blizzard logo are trademarks and/or registered trademarks of Activision. Overwatch Conversations Viewer is a fan website and not associated with Activision.
